title: Happy Ghast [FORGE/FABRIC]
description: Adds a rideable Happy Ghast, with all it's Minecraft Live features!
body:
Adds a happy ghast, similar to the one from Minecraft Live!
Craft a Harness and equip it on your ghast to make it rideable, step off it to walk on it!

Currently includes:
- Step on top of the ghast!
- Multiple passenger support!
- All 16 Wool color harnesses!
- Find the dried ghast in the nether, hydrate it with water to turn it into a ghastling, and wait or feed it with snowballs to turn it into a Happy Ghast!

![Happy Ghasts Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d8a4610c15c849d50b0c829bd5e79bb9ebdf206_0.webp)
